interaction_phrase: provision of core national capability in quantum computing (QC) via the National Quantum Computing Centre
occurrence_sentence: STFC already plays a leading role in the National Quantum Technologies Programme2 (NQTP), including the provision of core national capability in quantum computing (QC) via the National Quantum Computing Centre3 (NQCC), and the establishment of a significant programme in Quantum Technologies for Fundamental Physics (QTFP), focussing on quantum sensing (QS).

interaction_phrase: the transition of the NQCC into its operational phase
occurrence_sentence: The pace of progress in QT is accelerating, and key developments such as the publication of the NQS, the transition of the NQCC into its operational phase, and the completion of the first phase of the QTFP programme, mean that this is the right time to re-examine and evolve our strategy.

interaction_phrase: The NQCC is a prime example of this approach
occurrence_sentence: In bringing together, academic research, technology innovation, industrial adoption and delivery of infrastructures and projects, STFC will support the long-term translation of science and technology for commercial and societal good. The NQCC is a prime example of this approach.

interaction_phrase: further development of the NQCC
occurrence_sentence: We will particularly work with EPSRC on the further development of the NQCC and the QTFP programme as well as how our National Laboratories can support groups such as the Materials for Quantum Network (M4QN).

interaction_phrase: the NQCC
occurrence_sentence: The NQS will be delivered through collaboration across the UK research and innovation sector.

interaction_phrase: operation of the Boulby Underground Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: Working with international colleagues and across government agencies we will leverage STFC science capabilities and operation of the Boulby Underground Laboratory as a gateway to both the science impact of STFC and the opportunity to bring inward investment into the UK science realm.

interaction_phrase: improved particle detection for facilities such as ISIS
occurrence_sentence: This may range from improved particle detection for facilities such as ISIS, to cutting edge sensors for studying biological systems at RFI, offering insights that may accelerate the discovery of new medicines.

interaction_phrase: UKRI investment
occurrence_sentence: The first five years of the NQCC programme represents a combined UKRI investment of £150m across the facility, infrastructure, technology and user engagement.

interaction_phrase: development of unique infrastructure such as the quantum campus at the Boulby Underground Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: The development of unique infrastructure such as the quantum campus at the Boulby Underground Laboratory underscores our strategic investment in infrastructure to support research and innovation.

interaction_phrase: the ChipIR facility at ISIS allows QT devices and materials to be tested
occurrence_sentence: At the opposite end of the scale, the ChipIR facility at ISIS allows QT devices and materials to be tested rapidly in a hard radiation environment with a similar spectrum to that found in operating conditions.

interaction_phrase: ISIS Neutron and Muon Source
occurrence_sentence: With the opening of the Extreme Photonics Application Centre in 2026, alongside the ISIS Neutron and Muon Source, the Harwell Quantum Cluster will have an unrivalled concentration of facilities and expertise.

interaction_phrase: successful model used to build and operate the NQCC
occurrence_sentence: This is an extension of the successful model used to build and operate the NQCC and the Hartree Centre.

interaction_phrase: expansion of Boulby Underground Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: A large-scale QT campus will be constructed as part of the expansion of Boulby Underground Laboratory, capable of supporting experimentation and deployment of quantum systems in background-free conditions, and with world-class technical support.

interaction_phrase: centres of expertise including NQCC
occurrence_sentence: We will support and grow our technology R&D activities for next-generation QT, bringing together our communities with centres of expertise including NQCC, Hartree Centre, and Scientific Computing Department.

interaction_phrase: UK support
occurrence_sentence: Satellite-mediated quantum network delivered with UK support

interaction_phrase: Leveraging the state-of-the-art capabilities and expertise at ISIS
occurrence_sentence: Leveraging the state-of-the-art capabilities and expertise at ISIS, Diamond Light Source (DLS), Central Laser Facility (CLF), the RUEDI microscope, and other facilities, we will support the discovery, design, modelling, fabrication, and characterisation of materials and devices, with the goal of optimising quality, yield, and production throughput, and supporting fundamental research towards next-generation QT.

interaction_phrase: national approach
occurrence_sentence: NQCC will continue its leading role in Mission 1 (Scalable QC), working to define the national approach, and convening a wide range of partners in delivery of the mission.

interaction_phrase: announced by government
occurrence_sentence: STFC will fully engage with the five quantum missions announced by government.

interaction_phrase: constructing a large-scale QT campus as part of the Boulby Underground Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: Support for experimentation and deployment of quantum systems in background-free conditions, with world-class technical support by constructing a large-scale QT campus as part of the Boulby Underground Laboratory

interaction_phrase: Delivery of the QT Campus at the Boulby Underground Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: Delivery of the QT Campus at the Boulby Underground Laboratory

interaction_phrase: centres of expertise including NQCC
occurrence_sentence: Support and grow our technology R&D activities for next-generation QT by bringing together our communicates with centres of expertise including NQCC, Hartree Centre and Scientific Computing Department

interaction_phrase: UK support
occurrence_sentence: Satellite mediated quantum network delivered with UK support

interaction_phrase: state-of-the-art capabilities and expertise at ISIS
occurrence_sentence: Optimise quality, yield and production throughput by leveraging state-of-the-art capabilities and expertise at ISIS, Diamond Light Source, Central Laser Facility the RUEDI microscope, and other facilities to support discovery, design, modelling, fabrication, and characterisation of materials and devices

interaction_phrase: support discovery, design, modelling, fabrication, and characterisation of materials and devices
occurrence_sentence: Optimise quality, yield and production throughput by leveraging state-of-the-art capabilities and expertise at ISIS, Diamond Light Source, Central Laser Facility the RUEDI microscope, and other facilities to support discovery, design, modelling, fabrication, and characterisation of materials and devices

occurrence_sentence: Optimise quality, yield and production throughput by leveraging state-of-the art capabilities and expertise at ISIS, Diamond Light Source, Central Laser Facility the RUEDI microscope, and other facilities to support discovery, design, modelling, fabrication, and characterisation of materials and devices
